name: Sankalp
overview: SANKALP is a premium Indian socio-political drama that explores how power is manufactured not through elections, but through mentorship and institutional control. Inspired by the ancient Chanakya–Chandragupta chronicles, the series reimagines political strategy for modern India, where classrooms replace battlefields and bureaucrats replace soldiers.

trailers.title: Sankalp - Official Trailer | Nana Patekar, Sanjay Kapoor & Neeraj Kabi | Amazon MX Player
